links.description: Follow your favorite high school teams and players
Explore and purchase photos of your local teams and players
See top plays & highlights of the best high school sports
Get access to live game streams and full replays for 8000+ schools
Don't miss the action – Get Official Tickets
Set up your high school team

pageProps.pageDescription: Relive the Starkville Football (2025) individual player's stats and career pages including receiving yards per game, rushing yards per game, total tds, tackles per game, sacks, interceptions, passing tds, receiving tds, rushing tds, caused fumbles, fumble recoveries, qb hurries, completion percentage and qb rating.

minimums: Comp % - Pass Att must be at least 84.
QB Rating - Pass Att must be at least 84.
